<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Instituto Solaryz · C. Lucas Mello</title>
<meta name="description" content="Instituto Solaryz · Transformação humana integral. Despertar da Kundalini, Eventos e Método Solaryz.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400;1,500&family=Jost:wght@200;300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --black-deep: #050505;
    --gold: #C9A84C;
    --gold-warm: #E8C77A;
    --gold-deep: #8a6f2a;
    --gold-faint: rgba(201,168,76,0.18);
    --gold-line: rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
    --white: #f5f0e6;
    --white-dim: rgba(245,240,230,0.72);
    --white-faint: rgba(245,240,230,0.12);
    --serif: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    --sans: 'Jost', sans-serif;
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
  body {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: var(--sans);
    font-weight: 300;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    min-height: 100vh;
  }

  a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
  img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     NAV
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  .nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 22px 40px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10,10,10,0.85) 0%, rgba(10,10,10,0) 100%);
    transition: background 0.4s ease, padding 0.4s ease;
  }
  .nav.scrolled {
    background: rgba(10,10,10,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    padding: 14px 40px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-faint);
  }

  .nav-logo {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 18px;
    letter-spacing: 0.22em;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .nav-logo img { width: 36px; height: 36px; }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 40px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.28em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    transition: color 0.2s;
    font-weight: 400;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     FLOATING WHATSAPP
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  .float-wa {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 28px; right: 28px;
    z-index: 99;
    width: 60px; height: 60px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--gold);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(201,168,76,0.35), 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
  }
  .float-wa:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(201,168,76,0.5), 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
  .float-wa svg { width: 30px; height: 30px; fill: var(--black); }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     HERO
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  .hero {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 1fr;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--black);
  }

  .hero-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 140px 80px 80px;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.45em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.9s ease 0.3s forwards;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content: '';
    width: 40px; height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(46px, 5.6vw, 88px);
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 0.98;
    letter-spacing: -0.005em;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 1s ease 0.45s forwards;
  }
  .hero-title em {
    font-style: italic;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--gold-warm);
  }

  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.85;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    max-width: 460px;
    margin-bottom: 38px;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 1.1s ease 0.6s forwards;
  }

  .hero-name {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 38px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 1.2s ease 0.75s forwards;
  }
  .hero-name-line {
    width: 24px; height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
  }
  .hero-name-text {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 16px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--gold-warm);
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  }
  .hero-name-text span {
    font-style: normal;
    font-family: var(--sans);
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.32em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    margin-left: 10px;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 1.3s ease 0.9s forwards;
  }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     HERO IMAGE
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  .hero-image {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-image::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      linear-gradient(90deg, var(--black) 0%, transparent 35%, transparent 100%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, transparent 70%, rgba(10,10,10,0.7) 100%);
    z-index: 2;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero-image img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center top;
    filter: contrast(1.05) saturate(0.85);
  }

  /* Gold corner accent */
  .hero-image::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 50px; right: 50px;
    width: 80px; height: 80px;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--gold);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold);
    z-index: 3;
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  /* Address bar inside hero */
  .hero-addr {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-top: 26px;
    padding: 12px 18px;
    border: 1px solid var(--white-faint);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    width: fit-content;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 1.4s ease 1.05s forwards;
  }
  .hero-addr:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold-line);
    color: var(--white);
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.05);
  }
  .hero-addr svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; fill: var(--gold); flex-shrink: 0; }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     BUTTONS
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  .btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 17px 32px;
    font-family: var(--sans);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.26em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    cursor: pointer;
    border: none;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .btn svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--gold);
    color: var(--black);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover {
    background: var(--gold-warm);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(201,168,76,0.4);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover svg { transform: translateX(4px); }

  .btn-ghost {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--gold);
    border: 1px solid var(--gold-line);
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover {
    background: var(--gold-faint);
    border-color: var(--gold);
    color: var(--gold-warm);
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover svg { transform: translateX(4px); }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     SECTION FRAME
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  .section {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    align-items: stretch;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .section-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 100px 80px;
  }

  .section-image {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .section-image img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    filter: contrast(1.05) saturate(0.85);
  }

  .section-tag {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.45em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    width: fit-content;
  }
  .section-tag::before {
    content: '';
    width: 40px; height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(40px, 5vw, 72px);
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.02;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    letter-spacing: -0.005em;
  }
  .section-title em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--gold-warm);
  }

  .section-copy {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.9;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    max-width: 500px;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    letter-spacing: 0.015em;
  }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     DESPERTAR (Section 1)
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  .sec-despertar {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.05fr;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #050505 0%, #0a0a0a 100%);
  }
  .sec-despertar .section-image {
    order: 1;
  }
  .sec-despertar .section-image::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      linear-gradient(270deg, var(--black) 0%, transparent 35%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, transparent 70%, rgba(10,10,10,0.7) 100%);
    z-index: 2;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .sec-despertar .section-content {
    order: 2;
  }
  .sec-despertar .section-image::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 50px; left: 50px;
    width: 80px; height: 80px;
    border-left: 1px solid var(--gold);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--gold);
    z-index: 3;
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  /* Pillars row */
  .pillars {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--gold-line);
    border: 1px solid var(--gold-line);
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    max-width: 540px;
  }
  .pillar {
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    padding: 24px 20px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .pillar-num {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 32px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--gold-warm);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .pillar-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .actions-row {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 14px;
    align-items: center;
  }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     EVENTO DO MÊS (Section 2)
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  .sec-evento {
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 30%, rgba(201,168,76,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%),
      var(--black);
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    padding: 140px 80px;
    text-align: center;
    align-items: center;
    justify-items: center;
  }

  .evento-wrap {
    max-width: 1200px;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .evento-card {
    position: relative;
    aspect-ratio: 1080 / 1350;
    background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1a1410 0%, #0a0a0a 50%, #1f1808 100%);
    border: 1px solid var(--gold-line);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 50px 40px;
    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(201,168,76,0.05);
  }

  /* Decorative geometry */
  .evento-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -50%; left: -50%;
    width: 200%; height: 200%;
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.12) 0%, transparent 40%),
      conic-gradient(from 0deg at 50% 50%, transparent 0deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.04) 60deg, transparent 120deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.04) 180deg, transparent 240deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.04) 300deg, transparent 360deg);
    animation: rotate 60s linear infinite;
  }

  .evento-card-inner {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100%;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .evento-card-top {
    text-align: left;
  }

  .evento-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    padding: 8px 16px;
    border: 1px solid var(--gold-line);
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  .evento-card-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 44px;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.05;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .evento-card-name em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--gold-warm);
    display: block;
  }

  .evento-card-date {
    margin-top: 24px;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    color: var(--gold);
    padding-top: 20px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--gold-line);
  }

  .evento-card-mid {
    text-align: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
  }
  .evento-card-mid svg {
    width: 80px;
    height: 80px;
    opacity: 0.85;
  }

  .evento-card-bottom {
    text-align: left;
  }
  .evento-card-where {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .evento-card-loc {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.4;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  /* Right side of evento - text */
  .evento-text {
    text-align: left;
  }
  .evento-text .section-tag {
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .evento-meta {
    display: flex;
    gap: 36px;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    padding: 24px 0;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--white-faint);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-faint);
  }
  .evento-meta-item {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 6px;
  }
  .evento-meta-item-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
  }
  .evento-meta-item-value {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .evento-loc-link {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 22px;
    border: 1px solid var(--white-faint);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    width: fit-content;
  }
  .evento-loc-link:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold-line);
    color: var(--white);
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.05);
  }
  .evento-loc-link svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; fill: var(--gold); }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     METODO (Section 3)
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  .sec-metodo {
    grid-template-columns: 1.05fr 1fr;
    background: linear-gradient(225deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #050505 100%);
  }
  .sec-metodo .section-image::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      linear-gradient(90deg, var(--black) 0%, transparent 35%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, transparent 70%, rgba(10,10,10,0.7) 100%);
    z-index: 2;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .sec-metodo .section-image::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 50px; right: 50px;
    width: 80px; height: 80px;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--gold);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold);
    z-index: 3;
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  .pilares-list {
    list-style: none;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    max-width: 540px;
  }
  .pilar-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 38px 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-faint);
    align-items: start;
  }
  .pilar-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .pilar-row-num {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 14px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--gold);
    padding-top: 3px;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .pilar-row-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 19px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }
  .pilar-row-desc {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  .metodo-extra {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    padding: 22px 24px;
    border: 1px solid var(--gold-line);
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.04);
    max-width: 540px;
  }
  .metodo-extra p {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.7;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }
  .metodo-extra p::before {
    content: '';
    width: 5px; height: 5px;
    background: var(--gold);
    border-radius: 50%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     FOOTER
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  footer {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--white-faint);
    padding: 70px 80px 40px;
    background: var(--black-deep);
    position: relative;
  }

  .footer-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 60px;
    margin-bottom: 50px;
  }

  .footer-brand-mark {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
  }
  .footer-brand-mark img { width: 52px; height: 52px; }
  .footer-brand-mark-text {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 22px;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .footer-brand p {
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    max-width: 320px;
    font-style: italic;
    font-family: var(--serif);
  }

  .footer-col h4 {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .footer-col ul { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
  .footer-col a {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--white-dim);
    transition: color 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .footer-col a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .footer-col svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; fill: currentColor; opacity: 0.7; }

  .footer-bottom {
    padding-top: 32px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--white-faint);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: rgba(245,240,230,0.4);
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     ANIMATIONS
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes rotate {
    from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
    to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
  }

  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(40px);
    transition: opacity 1s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 1s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }
  .reveal.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  /* ────────────────────────────────────
     RESPONSIVE
     ──────────────────────────────────── */
  @media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .nav { padding: 18px 24px; }
    .nav.scrolled { padding: 12px 24px; }
    .nav-links { gap: 24px; }
    .nav-links a { font-size: 10px; }

    .hero, .section {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
      min-height: auto;
    }
    .hero-content, .section-content {
      padding: 110px 28px 60px;
      order: 2 !important;
    }
    .hero-image, .section-image {
      order: 1 !important;
      height: 70vh;
      min-height: 480px;
    }
    .sec-despertar .section-image,
    .sec-metodo .section-image { order: 1 !important; }
    .sec-despertar .section-content,
    .sec-metodo .section-content { order: 2 !important; }

    .sec-evento { padding: 80px 28px; }
    .evento-wrap { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 50px; }
    .evento-card { max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .evento-text { text-align: left; max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto; }

    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    footer { padding: 50px 28px 30px; }
    .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; text-align: center; }

    .pillars { max-width: 100%; }
    .pillar { padding: 18px 12px; }
    .pillar-num { font-size: 26px; }

    .evento-meta { gap: 24px; }
    .evento-card-name { font-size: 34px; }

    .float-wa { width: 54px; height: 54px; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; }
    .float-wa svg { width: 26px; height: 26px; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .actions-row { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
    .actions-row .btn { justify-content: center; width: 100%; }
    .hero-actions { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
    .hero-actions .btn { justify-content: center; }
    .pillars { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .evento-meta { flex-direction: column; gap: 18px; }
  }
</style>
</head>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════
     MÉTODO SOLARYZ
     ═══════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="section sec-metodo" id="metodo">
  <div class="section-content reveal">
    <span class="section-tag">Processo Completo</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">
      Método<br>
      <em>Solaryz</em>
    </h2>
    <p class="section-copy">
      Cinco forças integradas em um processo único de reescrita sistêmica. Para quem está pronto para cuidar da raiz — não dos sintomas.
    </p>

    <ul class="pilares-list">
      <li class="pilar-row">
        <span class="pilar-row-num">I</span>
        <div>
          <div class="pilar-row-name">Constelação Solaryz</div>
          <p class="pilar-row-desc">Relações, financeiro, família, infância e ancestralidade. Onde a história começou e como ela se desfaz.</p>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="pilar-row">
        <span class="pilar-row-num">II</span>
        <div>
          <div class="pilar-row-name">Ativação Kundalini</div>
          <p class="pilar-row-desc">Tratamento e expansão da sua energia — do seu espírito. A força que reorganiza tudo.</p>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="pilar-row">
        <span class="pilar-row-num">III</span>
        <div>
          <div class="pilar-row-name">Mentalidade Sistêmica</div>
          <p class="pilar-row-desc">Reprogramação profunda dos padrões herdados que ainda governam suas decisões.</p>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="pilar-row">
        <span class="pilar-row-num">IV</span>
        <div>
          <div class="pilar-row-name">Psicanálise Aplicada</div>
          <p class="pilar-row-desc">Integração consciente do que opera por baixo. Ancoragem psíquica do processo.</p>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="pilar-row">
        <span class="pilar-row-num">V</span>
        <div>
          <div class="pilar-row-name">Física Quântica</div>
          <p class="pilar-row-desc">O referencial científico que sustenta a compreensão do campo e da realidade que você cria.</p>
        </div>
      </li>
    </ul>

    <div class="metodo-extra">
      <p>Método próprio desenvolvido ao longo de anos</p>
      <p>Acompanhamento individual /p>
      <p>Exercícios exclusivos do Método Solaryz</p>
      <p>Acesso direto à equipe de facilitadores</p>
    </div>

      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-image">

  </div>
</section>

<script>
  // Nav scroll effect
  const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    if (window.scrollY > 50) nav.classList.add('scrolled');
    else nav.classList.remove('scrolled');
  });

  // Reveal on scroll
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible');
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.15 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
</script>
